text: PPO baseline: Run standard PPO (ppo_atari_envpool.py) on all 15 benchmark games with 40M env steps to establish baseline performance
motivation: Need baseline scores to compare against for all subsequent algorithmic innovations
expected_outcome: Establish per-game PPO scores. Expect strong performance on Breakout, Enduro, SpaceInvaders; weak on exploration-heavy games (MontezumaRevenge, PrivateEye, Venture, Solaris)

text: PQN baseline: Run standard PQN (pqn_atari_envpool.py) on all 15 benchmark games with 40M env steps to establish baseline performance
motivation: Need baseline scores from the Q-learning-based approach (PQN with Q-lambda returns and LayerNorm) to compare against PPO and subsequent innovations
expected_outcome: Establish per-game PQN scores. PQN may outperform PPO on some games due to Q-lambda returns and LayerNorm, but likely weak on exploration-heavy games
